name: com.loom.ecs
description: Unity embedding for Loom ECS: world runner, entity GameObject link, Entity Debugger, and Basic Runner / Flappy Bird / Speed Demo / HordeRush samples.

samples.description: Spawns moving UnityPosition entities and syncs optional EntityBehaviour views.
Playable Flappy Bird–style demo with project textures for environment, bird, and pipes.
Stress test with ParallelEach, sparse churn, and DrawMeshInstancedIndirect particles.
Twin-stick horde demo with project textures: ParallelEach, sparse Lifetime/HitFlash, shared EnemyKind, CommandBuffer combat.
